items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the query path from availability decision to grant source identity, but there is no evidence provided that confirms this path exists or can be queried. The linked use case outlines the need for this validation, yet the prior step evidence does not include any checks or reads that validate the presence of this query path. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, leading to an inconclusive status.
